name: Heaven Turkish Hammam Spa with Full Body Massage & Beauty Salon Hurghada
description:
Enjoy an exclusive Heaven Turkish Hammam Spa experience in Hurghada with comfortable hotel transfer to the spa. Begin your relaxation journey with soothing sauna and steam sessions that help open the pores and prepare your body for a traditional hammam ritual.

Continue with a full Turkish bath including full body peeling, foam bath and soap massage that deeply cleanses the skin and leaves it soft and refreshed. The treatment also includes coffee or coconut body peeling and Dead Sea salts peeling for hands and feet.

Relax in the salt cave and unwind in the jacuzzi while enjoying fresh fruits and soft drinks. The experience also includes two nourishing face masks and a relaxing full body massage that helps relieve tension and restore balance.

Finish your spa journey with a beauty salon service where you can choose a blow-dry hairstyle or haircut, making this Heaven Turkish Hammam Spa in Hurghada a complete luxury wellness experience.

Professional spa therapists

Salt cave relaxation therapy
Beauty salon service included

name: Hula Hula Island Snorkeling Boat Trip Hurghada
description:
Discover one of Hurghada’s most beautiful island experiences on this Hula Hula Island boat trip. Sail across the crystal-clear Red Sea aboard a comfortable boat and enjoy a perfect mix of relaxation, snorkeling, and fun sea activities.

Your adventure begins with hotel pickup and transfer to the marina, where you board a modern yacht and cruise toward the stunning Hula Hula Island. The trip includes three exciting stops. First, enjoy snorkeling at vibrant coral reef sites where you can discover colorful fish and marine life.

Next, spend relaxing free time on Hula Hula Island, swimming in turquoise waters or enjoying the soft sandy beach. Finally, experience fun water sports including banana boat and tube ride.

Back on board, enjoy a freshly prepared lunch buffet with soft drinks as you cruise back to Hurghada.

Relaxing free time on Hula Hula Island
Fun water sports including banana boat and tube ride
Crystal-clear waters and stunning island scenery
Comfortable yacht cruise across the Red Sea
Perfect day trip for families, couples, and sea lovers

reviewsSample.name: Matteo Ricci
reviewsSample.text: Tour assolutamente fantastico! Non avevo mai fatto snorkeling prima e questa esperienza all'Isola Hula Hula mi ha completamente conquistato. Le acque sono pulitissime e l'ambiente marino è straordinario. La barca era grande e confortevole, la guida era paziente e bravissima. Il servizio è stato impeccabile dall'inizio alla fine. Grazie mille a tutto il team di Sharm Gate per questa giornata indimenticabile!

reviewsSample.name: Robert Wilson
reviewsSample.text: One of the best days of my life! The Hula Hula Island snorkeling boat trip is truly an unforgettable experience. The Red Sea is home to some of the world's most beautiful reefs and this trip gives you amazing access to see it all up close. The crew was incredibly friendly and professional. Even my kids who were nervous about snorkeling ended up loving it. Highly recommend!

reviewsSample.name: Анна Волкова
reviewsSample.text: Это был самый лучший день за время нашего отдыха в Египте! Экскурсия на остров Хула Хула просто восхитительна. Бирюзовые воды, разноцветные рыбы и белоснежный песок острова — всё это создаёт ощущение настоящего рая. Организаторы продумали всё до мелочей: и трансфер, и снаряжение, и обед. Очень рекомендую забронировать эту экскурсию через Sharm Gate!

reviewsSample.name: Francesca Martini
reviewsSample.text: Esperienza fantastica e indimenticabile! Il tour in barca all'Isola Hula Hula è stato il momento più bello della mia vacanza ad Hurghada. Il mare è di un colore incredibile e i fondali marini sono ricchi di vita. La guida era professionale e molto disponibile. Mi ha aiutato tantissimo con lo snorkeling, nonostante fosse la mia prima volta. Il cibo era ottimo e abbondante. Tornerò!

reviewsSample.name: Jessica Davis
reviewsSample.text: Absolutely loved every moment of this trip! The Hula Hula Island snorkeling tour is a must-do when in Hurghada. The sea is incredibly clear with the most vibrant marine life I've ever witnessed. The whole organization was smooth and professional. Our guide was brilliant — enthusiastic, knowledgeable, and made sure everyone was comfortable. The island is gorgeous. Worth every penny!

Discover the magnificence of Karnak Temple, explore the impressive Mortuary Temple of Queen Hatshepsut, wander through the Valley of the Kings, and much more. This Luxor day tour provides a captivating glimpse into Egypt’s rich and timeless history.

name: Mahmya Island Full Day Snorkeling Boat Trip Hurghada
description:
Discover the breathtaking beauty of Mahmya Island on this unforgettable full-day boat trip from Hurghada. Sail across the crystal-clear waters of the Red Sea to one of the region’s most exclusive and protected islands, located within Giftun National Park.

Relax on soft white sandy beaches, swim in turquoise lagoons, or explore vibrant coral reefs filled with colorful marine life. Enjoy guided snorkeling in some of the best underwater spots, perfect for both beginners and experienced snorkelers.

During the day, indulge in a freshly prepared lunch served at the island restaurant while enjoying panoramic sea views. Spend your free time sunbathing, walking along the pristine shoreline, or simply soaking in the peaceful island atmosphere.

This Mahmya Island experience combines relaxation, adventure, and natural beauty, making it one of the most memorable Red Sea excursions from Hurghada.

Crystal-clear water and white sandy beaches
Guided snorkeling in vibrant coral reefs
Relaxing beach time on Mahmya Island
Freshly prepared lunch with sea views
Perfect mix of relaxation and adventure

name: Morning Desert Quad Bike Safari with Camel Ride & Bedouin Camp Hurghada
description:
Experience the thrill of riding a quad bike through the stunning desert landscapes of Hurghada on this exciting adventure. After hotel pickup, head to the desert safari station where you will receive a short safety briefing before starting your quad bike ride across the golden sands.

Drive through the vast desert and enjoy the beautiful scenery of the Red Sea mountains. During the trip, you will also enjoy a short camel ride and experience a traditional part of Bedouin life.

The adventure continues with a visit to an authentic Bedouin tent where you can relax and learn about the culture and lifestyle of the local Bedouin people. At the camp, enjoy a cup of traditional Bedouin tea while taking in the peaceful desert atmosphere.

This quad bike excursion is perfect for beginners and adventure lovers looking to explore the natural beauty of the Hurghada desert in a fun and unique way.

Suitable for beginners and first-time riders

Visit a traditional Bedouin camp

Perfect adventure activity for couples, friends, and families

reviewsSample.name: Rachel Green
reviewsSample.text: Truly an unforgettable experience! Sharm Gate organized everything perfectly. The quad bikes were ready to go, helmets and goggles provided, and the guide was incredibly welcoming. Speeding through the desert with the Red Sea mountains as a backdrop was breathtaking. The Bedouin tea ceremony was the most peaceful moment of our trip. Book this without hesitation!

reviewsSample.name: Сергей Николаев
reviewsSample.text: Великолепная экскурсия! Организация на высшем уровне — всё чётко по расписанию, встреча у отеля, удобный транспорт. Квадроциклы мощные и современные. Особенно впечатлили горы на горизонте — виды просто потрясающие. Бедуинский чай с финиками — настоящее угощение. Всем советуем!

reviewsSample.name: Valentina Bianchi
reviewsSample.text: Vacanza da ricordare grazie a questo tour straordinario! Il deserto al mattino è spettacolare e il giro in quad adrenalinico. La nostra guida parlava un po' di italiano e ci ha raccontato storie bellissime sul popolo beduino. Il tè alla menta nel campo era delizioso. Cinque stelle meritate!

reviewsSample.name: Thomas Anderson
reviewsSample.text: Perfect way to start the day in Hurghada! The morning desert air was fresh and cool, ideal for an adventure. The quad bikes were well-maintained and the guide's safety briefing was thorough. Watching the sunrise over the desert while on a camel was simply magical. Highly recommended for adventurers!

reviewsSample.name: Ольга Смирнова
reviewsSample.text: Замечательный тур для любителей активного отдыха! Гиды очень опытные, объяснили всё на доступном языке. Ехать по пустыне на квадроцикле — это совершенно другие ощущения, чем обычные экскурсии. Верблюд был послушным и добродушным. Бедуинский лагерь — это настоящее погружение в культуру Египта!

name: Nefertari Snorkeling Cruise with Submarine Hurghada
description:
Step aboard the spectacular Nefertari Cruise in Hurghada, a unique boat designed as a floating replica of Queen Nefertari’s ancient tomb. This unforgettable Red Sea experience combines snorkeling, underwater viewing and Egyptian cultural atmosphere in one tour.

The journey begins with a relaxing cruise from Makadi Bay Marina toward Abu Hashish Island. Guests can visit the submarine-level observation deck to admire colorful coral reefs and marine life through large panoramic windows without getting wet.

You will also have the chance to dress up as an ancient Egyptian king or queen and take memorable photos on Tutankhamun’s throne. After that, enjoy a guided snorkeling stop to explore the vibrant underwater world of the Red Sea.

The trip ends with a delicious 3-course lunch or dinner with seafood or chicken while sailing back to the marina.

reviewsSample.name: Андрей Волков
reviewsSample.text: Невероятный опыт! Поездка на остров Оранж Бэй с Sharm Gate была самой лучшей частью нашего отпуска. Лодка отправилась вовремя, команда была очень дружелюбной. Снорклинг в тёплых водах Красного моря — это нечто особенное. Мы видели морских коньков, осьминогов и бесчисленное множество тропических рыб. Тюбинг был весёлым и незабываемым. Приедем снова!

reviewsSample.name: Ольга Морозова
reviewsSample.text: Просто волшебный тур! Поездка на Оранж Бэй стала настоящим украшением нашего отдыха в Египте. Белоснежные пляжи, лазурная вода и удивительный подводный мир — всё это реально существует! Особенно запомнилось снорклинг рядом с коралловыми рифами, где мы увидели морских черепах. Персонал был очень заботливым и профессиональным. Рекомендуем с удовольствием!

reviewsSample.name: Сергей Новиков
reviewsSample.text: Великолепная экскурсия! Мы отдыхали в Хургаде и выбрали этот тур на Оранж Бэй. Не пожалели ни на секунду! Остров невероятно красивый, воды чистые и тёплые. Снорклинг был потрясающим — инструктор показывал самые живописные места рифа. Всё отлично организовано, никаких задержек. Еда на борту была свежей и вкусной. Советуем всем без исключения!

reviewsSample.name: Екатерина Иванова
reviewsSample.text: Этот тур превзошёл наши ожидания! Остров Оранж Бэй просто восхитителен. Вода прозрачная как стекло, а под водой настоящий подводный рай — яркие рыбы, кораллы всех форм и размеров. Гид был отличным — терпеливым и заботливым. Трансфер от отеля был пунктуальным. Очень понравился шведский стол на борту. Лучший день в Хургаде, однозначно!

reviewsSample.name: Дмитрий Козлов
reviewsSample.text: Потрясающий тур на остров Оранж Бэй! Это было лучшее приключение нашего отпуска. Лодка была чистой и удобной, экипаж очень приветливым. Снорклинг в Красном море превзошёл все ожидания — видимость отличная, подводный мир невероятно богатый. Банановая лодка доставила массу удовольствия. Трансфер из отеля без проблем. Пять звёзд заслуженно!

description:
Experience the incredible underwater beauty of the Red Sea without diving on this Panorama Semi Submarine trip in Makadi Bay. Step aboard a comfortable semi-submarine designed with large panoramic windows, offering stunning views of colorful coral reefs and vibrant marine life beneath the surface.

Relax in the air-conditioned underwater viewing deck as you watch exotic fish and fascinating reef formations glide past your window. This unique experience is perfect for families, non-swimmers, and anyone who wants to explore the Red Sea in a safe and comfortable way.

Enjoy time on the upper deck for sunshine and fresh sea air while cruising across the crystal-clear waters of Makadi Bay. This unforgettable sea adventure combines relaxation, sightseeing, and marine discovery — all without getting wet.

reviewsSample.name: Сергей Морозов
reviewsSample.text: Замечательный день на острове Парадайз! Впечатления от снорклинга в Красном море ни с чем не сравнятся. Кораллы невероятно красивые, вода прозрачная до дна. Организация экскурсии на высшем уровне: вовремя забрали, вовремя привезли, всё включено. Персонал внимательный и дружелюбный. Отличная цена за такой насыщенный день!

reviewsSample.name: Amanda White
reviewsSample.text: This was the most memorable day of our Egypt trip! Paradise Island is absolutely stunning — white sandy beaches, crystal clear water, and the most colourful reefs I have ever snorkeled in. The tour staff are attentive and ensure everyone's safety while having fun. The lunch was fresh and tasty. Highly, highly recommend!

reviewsSample.name: Thomas Clark
reviewsSample.text: Incredible value for money! The Paradise Island boat trip includes hotel transfer, full-day boat ride, snorkeling equipment, water sports (banana boat and tube), and a delicious buffet lunch — all for a very reasonable price. The island itself is stunning. Our family had an absolutely wonderful day. Book it without hesitation!

reviewsSample.name: Екатерина Соколова
reviewsSample.text: Поездка на остров Парадайз превзошла все ожидания! Яхта красивая и чистая, море тёплое и прозрачное. Снорклинг у коралловых рифов — это просто незабываемо, мы увидели столько разных рыб! Команда отзывчивая и весёлая. Трансфер из отеля был удобным. Всей группой рекомендуем эту экскурсию!

reviewsSample.name: Valentina Conti
reviewsSample.text: Questa gita in barca è stata la migliore cosa che abbiamo fatto durante la vacanza a Hurghada! L'isola del Paradiso è incantevole, la spiaggia è pulitissima e il mare è cristallino. Lo snorkeling è stato emozionante. La guida ci ha mostrato pesci di tutti i colori. Pranzo abbondante e delizioso. Torneremo l'anno prossimo!

name: Private Glass Bottom Boat with Snorkeling Hurghada
description:
Enjoy a relaxing private glass bottom boat tour in the beautiful waters of Hurghada. This 3-hour experience is perfect for families, couples, and small groups who want to explore the Red Sea in comfort and privacy.

After hotel pickup, head to the marina and board your private glass bottom boat designed for up to 8 people. As the boat cruises over the colorful coral reefs, you can watch the vibrant marine life through the large glass panels without getting wet.

During the trip, the boat will stop at a beautiful snorkeling spot where you can swim and discover the amazing underwater world of the Red Sea. Snorkeling here allows you to see colorful fish and coral reefs up close.

After snorkeling, continue the trip while enjoying fish watching directly from the glass bottom of the boat. This private tour offers a peaceful and enjoyable way to explore the Red Sea before returning to your hotel in Hurghada.

name: Sea Scope Submarine Boat Experience Hurghada
description:
Explore the incredible underwater world of the Red Sea without getting fully wet on this exciting semi-submarine cruise in Hurghada.

Board a modern semi-submarine designed with large panoramic windows, allowing you to comfortably sit below sea level and enjoy breathtaking views of vibrant coral reefs, exotic fish, and marine life. This is the perfect experience for families, non-swimmers, and anyone who wants to discover the beauty of the Red Sea in a unique way.

During the trip, you will also stop for a snorkeling session in crystal-clear waters. Dive in and explore colorful coral gardens and tropical fish up close, with professional guidance available if needed.

Relax onboard and enjoy a smooth cruise along the stunning Hurghada coastline before returning to the marina. Convenient hotel pickup and drop-off are included for a stress-free experience.

This tour combines underwater discovery, relaxation, and adventure — perfect for all ages.

Discover vibrant coral reefs and marine life
Snorkeling stop in crystal-clear Red Sea waters
Comfortable cruise with hotel pickup and drop-off

name: Sunset Desert Quad Bike Safari with Camel Ride & Bedouin Camp Hurghada
description:
Experience an unforgettable sunset adventure in the beautiful desert of Hurghada with this exciting quad bike safari. After hotel pickup in the afternoon, head to the desert safari station where you will receive a short safety briefing before starting your quad bike ride across the golden sands.

Ride through the stunning desert landscape and enjoy breathtaking views of the Red Sea mountains as the sun begins to set over the horizon. The warm desert colors and peaceful atmosphere make this the perfect time for an adventure.

During the excursion, you will also enjoy a short camel ride and experience a traditional part of Bedouin culture. The tour continues with a visit to an authentic Bedouin tent where you can relax and learn more about the lifestyle of the desert people.

At the camp, enjoy a cup of traditional Bedouin tea while watching the beautiful sunset over the desert before returning to your hotel in Hurghada.
highlights: Exciting quad bike ride through the Hurghada desert
Stunning sunset views over the desert landscape
Short camel ride experience
Visit a traditional Bedouin camp
Enjoy authentic Bedouin tea
Beautiful Red Sea mountain scenery

reviewsSample.name: Татьяна Лебедева
reviewsSample.text: Идеальное закатное приключение! Езда на квадроцикле была захватывающей, а катание на верблюде — замечательным опытом. Лагерь бедуинов был уютным, а чайная церемония — приятным дополнением. Незабываемый тур!

reviewsSample.name: Сергей Морозов
reviewsSample.text: Это стало изюминкой всего нашего отпуска в Хургаде! Квадроциклы были мощными, а маршрут по пустыне — захватывающим. Гиды были профессиональны и следили за безопасностью каждого. Очень рекомендую!

reviewsSample.name: Ольга Новикова
reviewsSample.text: Обожала каждую минуту этого тура! Пустынный пейзаж на закате потрясающий, а езда на квадроцикле была очень веселой. Гостеприимство бедуинов было искренним и тёплым. Этот тур превзошёл все мои ожидания!

reviewsSample.name: Андрей Волков
reviewsSample.text: Какой захватывающий опыт! Гонять по пустыне на квадроциклах во время заката — это нечто незабываемое. Весь тур был хорошо организован, а гиды были превосходны. Катание на верблюде понравилось и детям!

reviewsSample.name: Наталья Козлова
reviewsSample.text: Мы провели невероятное время на этом туре! Организация была на высшем уровне и всё прошло гладко. Лагерь бедуинов был красивым и очень аутентичным. Это обязательное занятие в Хургаде. Заслуженные 5 звёзд!
